title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: FOREST GROVE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1715 Nichols Lane Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Services are available to any student enrolled in the Forest Grove, Banks or Gaston school districts, including home school and private school. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (503) 359-4057 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-4057 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Banks School District, Forest Grove School District, and Gaston School District TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located next to the tennis courts at Forest Grove High School Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOREST GROVE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
